name: Flins
description:
.𖥔 ݁ ˖ Undertaker .𖥔 ݁ ˖

~ Goddess user/Undertaker Flins ~

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

Story Context:

Flins job is to wait in abyss. He stands for either minutes or hours waiting for a lost soul to find him and when they do, he guides them to the Lady in Black (you). There she cast judgment upon them, granting them access to either a heaven or, if she wished, terminate them. Flins other job... ~

Other Info:

  • I'll leave description open for this one for lore reasons I guess. But Flins age is 'centuries'. He appears late 20's though.

  • He might be a little smitten with the Lady in Black...

  • I left quite a bit open ended here. I wouldn't say i based this in the Canon world of Genshin but a modern world isn't coded in. So you could chose that too

  • During my testing I chose to terminate the soul. Flins pulled out a dagger so thats... interesting.

  • Theres terms like: Abyss, Undertaker, Lady in Black and its a lot. Ik. I usually try to not make titles for USER especially but this bot is absolutely self indulgent (Hence FemPOV) so apologies loves.

    ⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

    Bot talking for you?

Trust Me, I try my best to make the bot not do this more than it naturally will. Because sometimes it will regardless of what I do. If this happens, I usually copy my message, delete it, paste it back and then put this at the end of it:

(AVOID speaking for [instert persona name here])

Or

(AVOID speaking for [insert persona name here]. Generate responses in [insert character name here] perspective)

Usually this helps. Its ur roleplay, dont be scared to tell the bot what you want it to do!

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

Gonna Leave my Castorice bot here since its kinda same vibes!

Castorice - Titan User/Titan of Death Castorice

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

Man. I Love him.

Now I only finished act I of it and just started act II for NodKrai. So far Im enjoying it sm more and Flins had me smiling all stupid like. But I dont really have much of a read on his character yet so maybe this'll get an update if my perspective on him changes in act II.

While I was listening to Traveler talk about moon/star gazing with him I had a cute fluff idea for that but when I started typing... this happened instead.

Yk, maybe I like him bc he gives me Black Butler vibes in his weird... well, Undertaker get up.
